package rulefixtures

// scenario for slice_append_without_prealloc_known_bound: Slice append inside a range loop without visible preallocation when the bound is locally known.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: hot_path; severity: info.
type Rule363NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario363Negative(records []Rule363NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
